description: CompositionOrange round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowDo not iron on embellishmentsThis tee from ed hardy has a great print on front and back inspired by tattoo designs – wear this to complement your own tats. Subtle distressing on the hems and print gives a worn look – ed hardy are right on trend with the lived-in look of their clothing.Models statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
